data.revised_prompt: Create a clean HD 2D game enemy concept illustration for a cultivation roguelite: a single cute-but-hostile chibi ranged enemy, compact cultist/demon marksman in a dark robe-armor mix. Full body visible, centered, three-quarter RPG combat view, idle hostile stance, generous padding, clear feet anchor, subject occupies about 56% of the canvas. The silhouette must be easy to read at small in-game sizes and clearly distinct from a melee unit: oversized shoulder shape, short compact torso, small legs, reduced ornament complexity, simplified details, readable hostile proportions. Give the character one glowing ranged focus: a short crossbow, talisman launcher, or orb-focus held ready to fire, with restrained magical glow. Include one or two bright blue cracks/glows in the body or armor, small cloth strips, dark metal accents, charcoal black robes with muted steel details and electric blue/cyan highlights. Cool rim light, strong contrast, but no dramatic scene lighting. Style should be hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG enemy concept, crisp silhouette, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Background must be a perfectly flat solid chroma-key magenta #FF00FF with absolutely no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation. No UI, no text, no watermark, no giant spell circles, no many floating objects, no cluttered pose, no silly expression, no gore, no overdesigned staff, no boss-scale ornaments. Single enemy only.
